creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Best summer spot in Copenhagen? 🇩🇰👇

This little perfect swimming spot is called Badezone Byskoven if you wanna check it out on Google Maps 🤝

The nearest metro station is Sluseholmen and the walk is very pretty, but around 3,5 kilometres and you’re not going to pass any shops so make sure you load up on water/snacks. And please use the bins for your rubbish 😇

It’s 28 degrees in Copenhagen today so this place is a true lifesaver 🤠🔥

#copenhagen #copenhagenlife #denmarktravel #traveltips

transcription.text: Here's a proper hidden gem in Copenhagen, so please guys, shhh! This spot is absolutely perfect in the summertime when the swim spots in the city center are packed and noisy. Here there are never really that many people and it's probably the prettiest place to go for a swim in Copenhagen. Make sure to bring your own snacks and drinks as there aren't any shops around. It truly is a lovely secluded place in the Danish capital.
